div.head: 24. Editorial Note
div.p: At 10 a.m. on October 17, 1962, the Joint Chiefs of Staff met and decided that a surgical strike against the MRBM sites alone represented an unacceptable risk. They incorporated their views in a memorandum to Secretary of Defense McNamara (JCSM-794-62;JCS Files), which suggested air attacks on a wide variety of military targets.
